texts.full_text: ed the following: overall true prevalence ≈ 93%, overall crude prevalence = 90.6%, bilateral prevalence ≈ 92%, significantly more frequent on the right side, no gender significance, and no significant differences between ethnicities except that of Brazilian populations. The pooled mean length (± SD) of the PM tendon (PT) was 30.63 ± 5.87 cm and that of its width was 3.68 ± 1.37 mm. Pooled frequencies of the types of PT insertion are reported. Conclusions: This meta-analysis demonstrated a higher prevalence of PM
